        // public (int Id, string Name) GetTuple() => (Id: Id, Name: Name);
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<global::Foo.C, global::System.ValueTuple<int, string>>> GetTuple_Expression() 
        {
            var p__this = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::Foo.C), "@this");
            var expr_0 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Property(p__this, typeof(global::Foo.C).GetProperty("Id")); // Id
            var expr_1 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Property(p__this, typeof(global::Foo.C).GetProperty("Name")); // Name
            var expr_2 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.New(typeof((int, string)).GetConstructor(new global::System.Type[] { typeof(int), typeof(string) }), expr_0, expr_1);
            var expr_3 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Convert(expr_2, typeof(global::System.ValueTuple<int, string>));
